description: Digests of legal documents. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe? Document #1: Manṣūr/Elʿazar b. M[...] sells 1/8 of a house for 14 dinars. Specifies the amount of the ḥikr (ground rent, see Med Soc IV, p. 37). Document #2: Conditions for the betrothal (erusin/qiddushin) of Ḥalfon b. Elʿazar. The fiancee's name may be Turfa, but not enough is preserved to be certain. See T-S 13J3.13 (PGPID 7967) for a list of related documents.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
